# Drei Fragezeichen Ranking App - Project Instructions

## Project Overview
Web application for ranking "Drei Fragezeichen" (Three Question Marks) audio drama episodes 1-10 with persistent storage.

**Tech Stack:** Vue 3, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS

## Setup Steps

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Scaffold Vue 3 project with Vite
- [x] Create main ranking components
- [x] Implement rating functionality with 1-10 scale
- [x] Add sorting options (by episode or by rating)
- [x] Implement localStorage for data persistence
- [x] Install dependencies and verify build
- [x] Create dev task
- [ ] Launch server
- [x] Update README with instructions

## Development Guidelines
- Use Vue 3 Composition API
- Store episode data and ratings in reactive state
- Persist ratings to localStorage
- Style with Tailwind CSS for clean UI
